'''T'Sal''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] "[[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] jockey" found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. They were once hired by a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who owned a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] and was paid 50 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per day.
